comments.author: FayeSpica
comments.body:
Confirmed on my side: I ran it on an A3 machine and hit the same issue.
Thanks for the thorough investigation and the initial fix. 
I see you're working on Cosmos3-Super — would it make sense to fold this fix into that, or keep them separate?

comments.author: zhangj1an
comments.body:
> Confirmed on my side: I ran it on an A3 machine and hit the same issue.
> Thanks for the thorough investigation and the initial fix. 
> I see you're working on Cosmos3-Super — would it make sense to fold this fix into that, or keep them separate?

Yes okay, I will include this fix into Cosmos3-super recipe. 🙇‍♀️

title: [Bug][NPU][CI] RMSNorm.forward_npu / RMSNormVAE.forward_npu crash on CPU tensors
